text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 4 day(s). I'm struggling to breathe.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: migraine/discharge

text: Dangerously high fever, severe muscle pain, utterly exhausted. This has been 8 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s).
label: influenza/mild

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 2 day(s), and I can't seem to shake it, which frightens me.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 8 day(s) like this, and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 6 day(s), deteriorating, and I feel more unwell than yesterday. I have a very high fever.

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 15 day(s). I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 15 day(s) of this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
